raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX XXXX, I did open this account with Wyndham for a Barclay 's Credit Card due to plans to possibly upgrade my contract. Well, I chose not to upgrade and I left the presentation. My newlywed husband stayed on for the rest of the presentation to learn more about Wyndham.

My husband ended up signing a contract with Wyndham by scamming him into thinking he was getting a great deal, yet what they did was put a {$11000.00} charge on this new credit card I didn't even have yet. I was not even there at the time the contract was signed.

I disputed this charge with Barclays and they denied and said I would have to reach out to Wyndham. I wrote them back and demanded that they show me evidence that I authorized this charge. That was in the beginning of XXXX and I have not heard back from them.
